articles.title: Taylor Frankie Paul Says Domestic Violence Headlines Feel 'Like the End of the World' in First Televised Interview Since Scandal - Yahoo
articles.description: Taylor Frankie Paul opened up in her first televised interview since the news of her alleged domestic violence incident with ex-boyfriend Dakota Mortensen broke. Paul told 'Good Morning America' that the news felt like the 'end of the world.'
articles.content:
• Taylor Frankie Paul gave first on-camera interview amid the news that there is an open "domestic assault investigation" regarding Paul and her ex-boyfriend Dakota Mortensen

articles.title: Senate Republicans struggle to make their voting fight uncomfortable for Democrats - Politico
articles.description: So far discussions of the SAVE America Act are falling short of the “talking filibuster” conservatives are demanding.
